arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends stern warning to Gabriel Jesus over Arsenal future
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has warned Gabriel Jesus that he must "earn" more minutes for Arsenal amid speculation on his long-term future at the Emirates Stadium. Now he needs to earn the right to play more.

arts.ttl: Arsenal expected XI vs Bournemouth as Saka starts but Martinelli misses out
arts.sum: football.london takes a look at how Mikel Arteta could line the Gunners side up for their Premier League clash with Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium Here's who football.london are expecting the Spaniard to start at the Vitality Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive triple title boost as Manchester City and Liverpool forced to wait to respond
arts.sum: The Gunners have had an excellent start of the season after going unbeaten, only dropping points in games in which they failed to keep 11 men on the field at Manchester City and in the hosting of Brighton. Clearly that hope has paid off as Havertz too Arteta had said he was dealing with a "few issues" which have hopefully subsided in the fortnight he opted not to join up with the German national side.

arts.ttl: Jurrien Timber sends clear message amid Arsenal injury doubts for Bournemouth clash
arts.sum: Jurrien Timber has posted a clear message on social media amid significant doubt surrounding his availability to feature for Arsenal against Bournemouth. In the lead up to the clash, he was not spotted in any training photos with Oleksandr Zinchenko and Ben White also among those missing.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'offered chance' to sign £79m France striker
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly offered the chance to sign Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s next Saliba? The ‘DREAM’ 20-year-old destined for stardom
arts.sum: Arsenal have had great success raiding Ligue 1 for talented centre-backs in recent years, capturing both William Saliba and Gabriel from France’s top-flight. The 20-year-old is rated by SciSports as the best centre-back in Ligue 1 this season and comes from the same stock as Kevin Danso, the Austria international defender who had been linked with a move to Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal debut set to arrive vs Bournemouth as Mikel Arteta issues ruthless message
arts.sum: Arsenal return to Premier League action this evening following the October international break as they take on Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium. However, several injury concerns could impact things significantly with Martin Odegaard still out and major doubt surrounding Bukayo Saka and Jurrien Timber.

arts.ttl: Arsenal great Freddie Ljungberg has Alexander Isak "hope" that features the Gunners
arts.sum: Alexander Isak has continued to excel since moving to Newcastle and compatriot Freddie Ljungberg wants to see him make the move - citing Arsenal as a destination

arts.ttl: Tyler Adams finally set for Premier League return
arts.sum: Bournemouth midfielder Tyler Adams missed the start of the 2024/25 Premier League campaign after undergoing surgery at the end of last season to fix an issue with his back. The USMNT captain joined Bournemouth on a $25 million deal from Leeds United in August 2023 but he made just four appearances in his debut season, completing only one full game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Tottenham and Newcastle learn asking price for 24-year-old transfer target
arts.sum: Newcastle United have been linked with a move for the Bournemouth attacker Antoine Semenyo. The Magpies are keen on signing the 24-year-old winger and they will face competition from the likes of Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur as well. According to Football Insider, the winger will be available for a fee of around £40-50 million.
